sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77715" key="panwni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-ωνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77715.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">general sale of wares</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:2:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
